name: label
description: Categorical labeling / coloring of zones (group, state, model, property, etc.). Validated against 'plot item create zone label ?' in FLAC2D 9.0.
examples: plot item create zone label group legend active on
plot item create zone label state any legend active on
plot item create zone label state average
plot item create zone label model legend active on
plot item create zone label property "young"
plot item create zone label extra index 1
notes: 'group' / 'state' / 'model' / 'type' are categorical: each unique value gets a distinct color.
'group' takes an optional 'slot' sub-keyword for group slot filtering.
'state' REQUIRES 'any' or 'average' as its next sub-keyword before any further options (legend, range, etc.).
'property' takes a String name directly: 'label property "young"' (no 'name' prefix here — different from 'contour property name "..."').
'extra' selects an extra slot: 'label extra index <n>'.
For continuous color mapping by a numeric field, use 'contour' instead of 'label'.
